before_corrective_actions.description: Original risk distribution — cause rows at each (Severity, Likelihood) cell.

after_corrective_actions.description: Adjusted risk distribution after proposed corrective actions. Rows without corrective actions retain original ratings.

risk_migration_summary.interpretation: All HIGH + MEDIUM HIGH cells cleared. Residual MEDIUM (2 rows) are F.6 token-drift (adj RPN 6, severity unchanged, likelihood halved) and F.15-c2 stale-citation TTL drift (adj RPN 8 — EC9↔EC11 roof is the strongest negative pair in the QFD and cannot be fully eliminated without giving up either freshness or perf).

residual_risks_requiring_v1_1_followup.description: Stale citation served when TTL_HOURS=24 outlives EC11=7d refresh cadence even after reducing TTL to 6 on top-50 sources.
residual_risks_requiring_v1_1_followup.reason_cannot_go_lower: EC9↔EC11 is the QFD roof's strongest negative pair (-2). Any further TTL reduction breaches EC7 prompt-cache hit target.
residual_risks_requiring_v1_1_followup.v1_1_recommendation: Implement event-driven vendor-doc webhooks where available; target adj RPN 4 (MEDIUM LOW).

residual_risks_requiring_v1_1_followup.description: Agent context exceeds EC8=8000 tokens silently on long sessions.
residual_risks_requiring_v1_1_followup.reason_cannot_go_lower: Provider tokenizer drift is a known risk as models evolve; no reliable upstream commitment to ABI stability.
residual_risks_requiring_v1_1_followup.v1_1_recommendation: Add quarterly tokenizer-diff CI job; target adj RPN 3 (MEDIUM LOW).
